title: Services
heading: Work With Us
description: Two practitioners, one sanctuary. Explore clinical therapy, Vedic sciences, and sacred readings — each offering a different door to the same wholeness.

palmistry.name: Bhima-Karma
palmistry.subtitle: Palmistry & Vedic Hand Analysis
leftParagraphs: Bhima-Karma's palmistry practice draws on decades of study in the Vedic science of hand analysis — reading not just the lines of the hand, but the living architecture of a person's life, character, and dharmic potential.
Through the ancient discipline of sacred hand reading, he illuminates temperament, life cycles, and the subtle currents shaping your path — offering clarity grounded in embodied wisdom.
rightParagraphs: A palmistry reading is a direct, standalone service. Through careful analysis of the lines, mounts, and formation of the hand, Bhima-Karma reveals the deeper patterns at work in your life — with precision, care, and rare depth of insight.
Payment confirms your booking and you will be guided immediately through the photo submission process. No discovery call required.

therapy.name: Bhima-Karma
therapy.subtitle: Trauma Consulting · Somatic Therapy
leftParagraphs: Bhima-Karma brings a deep background in trauma-informed consulting and somatic therapy. His approach is direct, embodied, and grounded — designed for those navigating complex trauma, life transitions, or the intersection of psychological and spiritual crisis.
rightParagraphs: His consulting sessions offer a focused, practical container for working through what cannot easily be spoken — drawing on the body's intelligence as much as the mind's. All enquiries are held with full confidentiality and care.
therapy.bookingDescription: Begin with an initial consultation to explore your situation and what support might look like.

mridanga.heading: Traditional Mridanga & Sanskrit
mridanga.description: Bhima-Karma holds a living lineage in traditional mridanga and foundational Sanskrit — offering rare, authentic transmission to sincere students through sacred sound and rhythm.

caitanya.name: Caitanya Lila
caitanya.subtitle: Vedic Psychotherapy
leftParagraphs: Caitanya Lila is a UKCP-registered psychotherapist whose practice weaves clinical depth with the ancient wisdom of Vedic psychology. Her approach meets the modern mind with clinical precision while honouring the soul's deeper intelligence.
Her work draws on somatic awareness, trauma-informed frameworks, and a profound understanding of how the inner landscape mirrors the outer life — creating space for genuine transformation.
rightParagraphs: Sessions offer a held space for trauma recovery, relational depth, and the exploration of self through both clinical and Vedic psychological frameworks.
Whether you seek clinical support or an integration of Western and Vedic approaches, her practice holds space for the whole person.
caitanya.bookingDescription: Explore clinical therapy and Vedic psychology through Caitanya Lila's dedicated practice — booking and enquiries are handled directly on her website.

sangasCta.heading: Sat Sangas & Events
sangasCta.description: Monthly gatherings, study circles, and community events hosted by Bhima-Karma and Caitanya Lila — spaces to practice, reflect, and connect.
